history.content:
Yes, you can return your laptop if you are within the 14-day cooling-off period under the EU Consumer Rights Directive. Since your return request is within this period, you are eligible to return the laptop for a refund.

Please note that if the laptop shows signs of use beyond reasonable examination—such as installed games, modified settings, or cosmetic marks—Omnia Retail may apply a deduction to the refund. However, installing games during the evaluation period is considered acceptable use and does not lead to a deduction.

Also, keep in mind there is a 10% restocking fee for opened laptops returned for non-defect reasons like change of mind.

If you would like to proceed, please contact customer support to receive return instructions. Once the laptop is received and inspected, your refund will be processed within 5 working days.
I couldn't find relevant information for your query in our documentation. Please contact our support team directly at support@omniaretail.ie or call 01-XXX-XXXX.
